nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Hypsipetes
nodes.summary: Hypsipetes（Hypsipetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如Nicobar bulbul、Philippine bulbul、Mindoro bulbul等26种鸟类。

nodes.name: Togian golden bulbul
nodes.summary: Togian golden bulbul（Hypsipetes aureus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Togian golden bulbul。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Togian golden bulbul
nodes.summary: The Togian golden bulbul (Hypsipetes aureus) is a species of passerine bird in the bulbul family Pycnonotidae. It is endemic to the Togian Islands in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. The Togian golden bulbul was formerly considered as conspecific with five other bulbuls, all called the northern golden bulbul before they were all split. This bulbul is now both placed with 24 other species in the genus Hypsipetes that was introduced in 1831 by Nicholas Vigors. References
